Official Rules

Zavora Fashion Affiliate Rewards Program

Eligibility

Open to creators, influencers, bloggers, and affiliates worldwide who are at least 18 years old and hold a valid Zavora Fashion affiliate account.

Campaign Period

Campaign start and end dates are announced inside the Affiliate Dashboard. Only verified sales made during the active campaign period count.

Rewards

1st Place: FREE Apple iPhone 19, or the latest available iPhone model if iPhone 19 is not officially released. 2nd Place: USD $2,000. 3rd Place: USD $1,000.

Winner Selection

Winners are selected by highest verified completed sales. Cancelled, refunded, disputed, self-purchase, fake, spam, bot, coupon abuse, or fraudulent sales do not count.

Verification

Zavora Fashion verifies affiliate accounts, sales history, customer payments, fraud signals, and order authenticity before issuing any reward.

Reward Delivery

Cash rewards are sent by PayPal or bank transfer. The iPhone reward ships to the winner's verified address. Rewards are normally issued within 30 days after verification.

Taxes & Disqualification

Taxes, customs duties, and local charges are the winner's responsibility. Fake orders, spam marketing, bot traffic, copyright violations, brand impersonation, illegal activity, or unethical promotion may cause immediate disqualification.

Final Decision

Zavora Fashion may modify, suspend, or cancel the campaign to protect program integrity. All decisions regarding winner selection, verification, and rewards are final.

Questions: affiliate@zavorafashion.com

Create Account

Start your affiliate profile

No admin approval wait. Add your details, create a password, and your affiliate ID will be ready immediately.
